column8: I'll never forgive June for______(lie) to me like that.
column9: Ivan's not very good at_______(make) friends.
column10: I can't resist___________(buy) things when they're in the sales.
column11: We've got to encourage students___________(study), not blame them for not studying.
column12: I don't know how you managed__________(persuade) the bank manager to lend you so much money.
column13: Does Jessica dislike________(walk) so much that she's not going to come with us?
column14: Do you deny_________(steal) the money? Yes or no?
column15: The kids were pretending______________(be) asleep, but they didn't fool me for a second.
column16: I refuse_____________(accept) that there's no alternative.
column17: No one can understand how Jill can afford____________(go) on so many holidays.
column18: He only just escaped____________(send) to prison. Next time, the judge won't be so forgiving.
column19: He expected____________(give) a brand new computer for Christmas, but all he got was a second-hand watch!
